name: Bridge
notes: Standalone crossing built directly onto a river tile, opening it up to foot soldiers and land vehicles that would otherwise be blocked by the water. Public once built — usable by anyone's troops, not just its builder's. Not tied to a base, so it doesn't need population capacity. Choice of a cheaper, weaker, fire-vulnerable material available earlier, or a pricier, sturdier one that unlocks later (see each materialStats entry's own unlockHqLevel) and is the only one Heavy land vehicles can cross (see game-design/01-map-and-terrain.md).
